decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m15-cb8-2010 already exists in the registry with identical payload (route_id M15, route_type local, borough Manhattan, same source 2010_02_25_brt_1st2nd_cb8). Per canonicalizer rule, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that record. No link to a different record is warranted.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Currently served by M15 bus route
